metadata.title:
WILL FIGHT FOR
| OPEN STREETS

QUESTION OF N. p. GRADE
SEPARATION WILL COME BE.
FORE SPECIAL MEETING OF
THE COUNCIL TONIGHT.

pages.raw_text:
The grade separation plans OF the
Northern Pacific are to be the main
topic of discussion at the commit.
tee Of the whole council called for
tonight. The railroad will be rep
resented by Edward J. Cannon, di.
vision counsel. George Turner will
represent and lead the discussion
of those opposed to the railroad
plans.


The opposition has so lined up
that it is not in accord with plans
that would close any street. AT
first opposition developed to clos.
ing Browne st. From time to time
property owners all along the line
sent in objections to closing streets
which would effect them until now
practically every proposition for a
closed street has fighting force
organized under the direction OF
George Turner.
